description: Replace science-advantage's Prisma-based vitest setup with a Drizzle-based one. Run drizzle-kit migrate once per integration run, split unit/integration setup files, keep truncate-and-reseed for per-test cleanup. Sub-track unblocks Track 3 Phase 1+ runtime verification.
deviation_notes: Carved out of Track 3 (prisma_drizzle_science_controllers_20260505) Phase 0 retrospective. Plan grew from 6 estimated to 10 actual tasks (split Phase 1 into create-helper + wire-config; added Phase 2 verify-unit + retire-shared; explicit smoke verification per task). Two unit test files (resolve-test-database-url + run-drizzle-migrate) cover URL derivation and migrate-spawn semantics with 11 cases total. Pilot integration test passes 5/5 against the new globalSetup; ran lint + targeted vitest at every commit.
